description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular agricultural building with a pitched gable roof made of metal panels, set on a flat, patterned green base that resembles grass or a field. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored wood with visible structural beams, giving it a rustic appearance. The front features a single, dark rectangular doorway, while the rear has a large rectangular opening, likely for ventilation or animal access. The roof is a prominent feature, with a metallic sheen and a central ridge running the length of the building. There are no visible windows, but the open rear and front door provide natural light and airflow. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of rural cowsheds found on farms.
description: A rustic wooden cowshed with a metal gable roof, set on a grassy base, featuring a single front door and a large rear opening for ventilation.
description_view_0: The side view shows the metal gable roof and wooden walls, with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_1: The front view displays a single dark rectangular doorway centered on the wooden facade beneath the gable roof.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a large rectangular opening, likely for ventilation or animal access, beneath the metal roof.
description_view_3: The opposite end view shows a wooden wall with a small door, possibly for human entry, and visible structural beams.
